verdict: A highly rhythmic and engaging chart with excellent clap-sync, let down slightly by a few awkward same-foot 16th sequences during holds.

issues.problem: Forced 16th-note same-foot transition (D -> L) in 115ms while holding U, which is highly awkward and disrupts natural alternate flow.
Repeats the forced 16th same-foot slide/jack (D -> L) during a U hold, causing physical discomfort or requiring advanced bracket techniques.
The transition from a 16th-note tap R to JUMP LD is very sudden and feels slightly jerky to perform.
